inputs.prompt: Extract ONLY <NOMEIE O ELEMENTO AQUI — ex.: the blue 'Sign in' button> from this user-interface image. Render it alone, centered, at its original scale, on a plain solid WHITE background, with nothing else in the frame. Preserve its exact shape, colors, text, icons, corners and styling; if any part is occluded or cropped behind another element, reconstruct it cleanly. Flat, front-facing, product-style cutout — no drop shadow, no reflection, no surrounding UI.
